plugins.name: open-forge
plugins.description: Automate self-hosting of open-source apps (Ghost, OpenClaw, Hermes-Agent, Ollama, Open WebUI, Stable Diffusion WebUI, ComfyUI, Dify, LibreChat) across cloud, VPS, Kubernetes, PaaS, Raspberry Pi, macOS VM, and localhost - provisioning, DNS, TLS, SMTP, and inbound email.
